title: vulnerability_export#report_data
description: Schema for providing additional report data for vulnerability report exports

project_vulnerabilities_history.description: This object should include an SVG asset to be rendered in PDF reports

group_vulnerabilities_over_time.description: This object should include an SVG asset to be rendered in PDF reports

project_security_status.description: Data for rendering the project grades summary in PDF reports

total_risk_score.description: Data for rendering the total risk score in PDF reports

open_vulnerabilities_over_time.description: Data for rendering vulnerabilities over time in PDF reports

vulnerabilities_by_age.description: Data for rendering vulnerabilities by age in PDF reports

dashboard_type.description: The type of vulnerability grouping this report is being created for

full_path.description: The full path of the vulnerable
